title: Military & Law Enforcement Uniforms
description: This mod adds military and law enforcement uniforms in Minecraft.
body:
![Description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2c53ecbc2eb21dd082c41a373f2f0983bb1ab91c.png)

Step into duty with the Military and Law Enforcement Uniforms mod. A detailed mod that brings a wide range of realistic and fictional uniforms into the game. Whether you're a soldier on the frontlines or an officer maintaining peace, this mod equips you with professionally crafted outfits tailored for roleplay, combat scenarios, or immersive city builds.

This mod includes improved textures, added variants for different ranks and branches, and options such as cap badges, insignias and law enforcement badges. Designed with both aesthetics and function in mind, it's perfect for military and law enforcement RP, security detail simulations, or just bringing more structure to your Minecraft world.

![Uniforms](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1eae76ff283845042e4fb11fb430cf4375440dc6.png)

### Enlisted Personnel Uniforms
![Enlisted Personnel Uniforms](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1bd3c8aa8c82dc2056309cf98b7adc8896bfb2c5.png)

This uniform variant features short sleeves exclusively for enlisted police, jail, and corrections personnel distinct from officers. Rank insignias are displayed on the sleeves for easy identification and roleplay clarity.

### Officer's Uniform
![Officer's Uniform](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5c1b73108ab3a187dcaa65ac1baf6bb64e0551d8.png)

The Commisioned Officer uniforms feature epaulets and rank insignias placed on the center chest. Navy officers are identified by distinct **_"executive curls"_** on the lower sleeve area, Marine officers by insignias on the lower front sleeve, and SSIB officers wear no epaulets, with ranks shown only on the lower sleeve.

### Cadet's Uniform
![Cadet's Uniform](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5ba0aa11ff41eac696b3f17880aad3057d6e6550.png)

This Cadet uniforms come in ash blue for military cadet and maroon for public safety cadet. A chest patch on the right side of chest indicates their class rank, from 4th class (lowest) to 1st class (highest), marking their progress through training. _**(v. 1.4.4 - comming soon)**_



 

This mod is for simple people, not looking to add too much but wanting to change up the game's armors.

 

NOTE: This Mod is still in it's early stage and doesn't have a Recipe Book at the moment. I suggest that you download JUST ENOUGH ITEMS to explore the crafting aspect of this mod.
